mapper.select: SELECT id, item_id, image_url, original_name, file_size, sort_order, created_at FROM item_image WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_image (item_id, image_url, original_name, file_size, sort_order) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{imageUrl}, #{originalName}, #{fileSize}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO item_image (item_id, image_url, original_name, file_size, sort_order) VALUES
(#{image.itemId}, #{image.imageUrl}, #{image.originalName}, #{image.fileSize}, #{image.sortOrder})
